lede_headline_HTML:
Grinches Choke Away 118–118 Tie
on a Missed Extra Point
lede_byline: Filed by the Commissioner · reads: brutal
lede_body_1: In a league where mercy is a foreign concept, Dave managed to snatch mediocrity from the jaws of victory — a tie, decided by a kicker he benched Tuesday and re-added in a panic Sunday morning. Poetry.
lede_body_2: Elsewhere, the Sofa Kings continue their reign of terror, and somebody named their team “Cleat Chasers” and then lost by 0.2. We don’t make the rules; we just enjoy them.
top_note: 128.4 pts · 4–0. Undefeated and unbearable about it.
fraud_note: 96.2 pts. Projected first. Finished like a folding chair.
stat_note: High score of Week 4 — Blitz Brigade, by a nose.
footer_line: Lawson Family & Friends Fantasy League · Est. 2020 · Trophy or bust
lede_headline: Grinches Choke Away 118–118 Tie on a Missed Extra Point
